best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-detailpage-003 title: user returns to the homepage from the detailed page after opening yelp in a browser module: pagina dettagliata source pages: 2 preconditions: user is on the detailed page. test data: test steps: 1. click on "open in browser". 2. click on "indietro". expected result: the homepage should be displayed.

test case id: tc-homepage-003 title: user clicks on a location and then on pathfinder module: homepage source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the homepage. test data: test steps: 1. click on "visualizzazione nuovo luogo". 2. click on "click sul luogo". 3. click on "click pathfinder". expected result: the pathfinder page should open.
